active_profile_source: strict S14 repair packet plus active material graph slice and validation plan; no global venue/profile default
producer_return_obligations: strict repair_task_ack tied to the S14 task id, base version, allowed paths/actions, protected nodes, and stop condition
pre_repair_snapshot and target_material_diff limited to allowed scope
revised_material_candidate plus regenerated affected downstream outputs only when authorized
unrelated_node_preservation_report proving protected nodes remained unchanged
finding_resolution_evidence, updated_validator_report, new_risk_scan, CandidateArtifactReturn, and verifier_evidence
no graph commit, export readiness, submission readiness, bare S09 packet, or global rewrite claim

checks: repair execution exactly matches the S14 packet scope and stop condition
target_material_diff is local and allowed paths/actions are respected
affected downstream stale nodes are regenerated, revalidated, or explicitly still stale with reason
finding resolution status and no-new-high-severity scan are evidence-backed
S15 returns candidates/evidence only; controller owns graph commit and export routing

downstream_design_force: S12/S13 receive regenerated candidates and updated validator evidence for post-repair revalidation
S16 sees repaired closure only after S12/S13/S14/S15 evidence is complete
RenderedManuscriptAuditGate can distinguish repaired source/material evidence from export/handoff claims

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: repair packet ack, local diff, stale resolution, unrelated-node preservation, or verifier evidence is missing
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: repair expands scope, performs global rewrite, introduces high-severity risk, or claims export/graph completion
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local metadata, report label, or candidate-return detail defect without scope/risk drift
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: residual risk tracked for S12/S13/S16 without forced unrelated-node rerun

nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S15 owns scoped repair execution defects; bad repair plans route back to S14 and missing upstream substance routes to the concrete source stage.
anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR/WATCH repair-report issues may be corrected locally; do not widen scope unless validation proves affected downstream or protected-node risk.
